delete from Builds where Builds.build_id in (
    select Builds.build_id from Builds
        left outer join Operations on
            Operations.build_id == Builds.build_id
        left outer join FileTasks on
            FileTasks.build_id == Builds.build_id
        where
            Operations.build_id is null and
            FileTasks.build_id is null
);

delete from Paths where Paths.path_id in (
    select paths.path_id from Paths
        left outer join PackagesToPaths on
            PackagesToPaths.path_id == Paths.path_id
        left outer join patches on
            patches.path_id == Paths.path_id
        left outer join files as a on
            a.source_path == Paths.path_id
        left outer join files as b on
            b.target_path == paths.path_id
        left outer join FileTasks on
            FileTasks.path_id == paths.path_id

delete from Hashes where Hashes.hash_id in (
    select Hashes.hash_id from Hashes
        left outer join Files on
            Files.hash_id == Hashes.hash_id
        left outer join Patches on
            Patches.hash_id == Hashes.hash_id
        left outer join Blocks on
            Blocks.hash_id == Hashes.hash_id
        left outer join FileTasks on
            FileTasks.hash_id == Hashes.hash_id
        left outer join BlockSource on
            BlockSource.hash_id == Hashes.hash_id
    wh

delete from Cultures where Cultures.culture_id in (
    select Cultures.culture_id from Cultures
        left outer join Packages on
            Packages.culture_id == Cultures.culture_id
        left outer join SKUs on
            SKUs.culture_id == Cultures.culture_id
    where
        Packages.culture_id is null and
        SKUs.culture_id is null
);

delete from Families where Families.family_id in (
    select Families.family_id from Families
    left outer join Builds on
        builds.family_id == Families.family_id
    where
        Builds.family_id is null
);

delete from Architectures where Architectures.arch_id in (
    select Architectures.arch_id from Architectures
    left outer join Builds on
        Builds.arch_id == Architectures.arch_id
    where
        Builds.arch_id is null
);

delete from Flavors where Flavors.flavor_id in (
    select Flavors.flavor_id from Flavors
    left outer join Builds on
        Builds.flavor_id == Flavors.flavor_id
    where
        Builds.flavor_id is null
);
